503.description: The Health Check is not successful

200.description: Email/password authentication added and setup email sent

parameters.name: search
parameters.description: Search across firstName, lastName, and email

parameters.name: tenantIds
parameters.description: Filter by tenant IDs (users in any of these tenants)

parameters.name: roleIds
parameters.description: Filter by role IDs (users with at least one membership with any of these roles)

parameters.name: statuses
parameters.description: Filter by statuses: active (timeJoined > 0), pending (invited). Empty = all.

parameters.name: emailDomain
parameters.description: Filter by email domain (e.g. beparallel.com for @beparallel.com)

post.description: Creates a new user with optional memberships. Admin access only (x-api-key).

get.description: Returns users matching the given filters. Admin access only (x-api-key).

parameters.name: search
parameters.description: Search across firstName, lastName, and email

parameters.name: tenantIds
parameters.description: Filter by tenant IDs (users in any of these tenants)

parameters.name: roleIds
parameters.description: Filter by role IDs (users with at least one membership with any of these roles)

parameters.name: statuses
parameters.description: Filter by statuses: active (timeJoined > 0), pending (invited). Empty = all.

parameters.name: emailDomain
parameters.description: Filter by email domain (e.g. beparallel.com for @beparallel.com)

post.description: Assigns a user to a tenant with a role. Admin access only (x-api-key).

get.description: Returns memberships matching the given filters. Inter-service access only (x-api-key).

post.description: Adds a permission to an existing role. Admin access only (x-api-key).

delete.description: Removes a permission from an existing role. Admin access only (x-api-key).

post.description: Creates a new permission. Admin access only (x-api-key).

200.description: Password reset email sent if the account exists

post.description: Finds all users with the same email and keeps only the primary user. Primary user selection: 1) User with Google login, 2) User with most tenant memberships. Tenants from secondary users are merged to the primary user, then secondary users are deleted. Run this BEFORE /sync/supertokens-to-database to clean up duplicates first. Use dryRun=true to preview changes without executing them.

parameters.name: dryRun
parameters.description: Preview mode - show changes without executing

post.summary: Clean up duplicate email accounts in Supertokens

post.description: Iterates over all Supertokens tenants and configures the Google third-party provider for those that are missing it. Tenants that already have Google configured are skipped. Use dryRun=true to preview which tenants would be updated.

parameters.name: dryRun
parameters.description: Preview mode - show changes without executing

post.summary: Configure Google OAuth provider on all existing tenants

post.description: Fetches all tenants, roles, permissions, users, and memberships from Supertokens and syncs them to the IAM database. WARNING: This operation DELETES all existing data before syncing. Use dryRun=true to preview what would be synced without making changes.

parameters.name: dryRun
parameters.description: Preview mode - show what would be synced without making changes

post.summary: Sync all data from Supertokens to the database

tenantId.description: ID of the tenant to switch to

password.description: New password for the user account

firstName.description: First name of the user to create

lastName.description: Last name of the user to create

email.description: Email of the user to create

password.description: Password for the user account (optional - if not provided, a random password is generated and user receives a reset email)

memberships.description: List of tenant memberships to assign to the user

timeJoined.description: Time in MS since epoch when user first signed up

totalCount.description: Total number of records matching the query

hasMore.description: Whether there are more results beyond the current page

hasEmailPasswordAuth.description: Whether the user has email/password authentication enabled

password.description: New password for the user account

id.description: Tenant ID (used as Supertokens tenant identifier)

name.description: Display name for the tenant. Defaults to the id if not provided.

userCount.description: Number of users (members) in the tenant

totalCount.description: Total number of records matching the query

hasMore.description: Whether there are more results beyond the current page

totalCount.description: Total number of records matching the query

hasMore.description: Whether there are more results beyond the current page

permissionId.description: Permission ID to add to the role

id.description: Role ID (used as Supertokens role identifier)

name.description: Display name for the role. Defaults to the id if not provided.

totalCount.description: Total number of records matching the query

hasMore.description: Whether there are more results beyond the current page

id.description: Permission ID (used as Supertokens permission identifier)

name.description: Display name for the permission. Defaults to the id if not provided.

totalCount.description: Total number of records matching the query

hasMore.description: Whether there are more results beyond the current page

email.description: Email address of the user requesting a password reset
Email address of the duplicate group

primaryUserId.description: ID of the user selected as primary

primaryReason.description: Reason for selecting this user as primary

deletedUserIds.description: IDs of secondary users that were deleted

mergedTenants.description: Tenants that were merged to the primary user

rolesRemoved.description: Number of extra roles removed from users in this group

errors.description: Errors encountered while processing this group

tenantId.description: Tenant ID where multiple roles were found

selectedRole.description: Role that was kept (best role based on hierarchy: admin > tech > internal-dim > customer-dim)

userId.description: User ID that was/would be deleted

loginMethods.description: Login methods of the deleted user

primaryLoginMethod.description: Login method of the primary user

deletedUsers.description: Secondary users that were/would be deleted with their login methods

dryRun.description: Whether this was a dry run (preview mode - no changes made)

totalUsers.description: Total number of users found in Supertokens

duplicateGroups.description: Number of emails with duplicate accounts

rolesRemoved.description: Total number of extra roles removed from users (when users had multiple roles in a tenant)

usersWithMultipleRolesCleaned.description: Number of users (not part of duplicate groups) who had multiple roles cleaned

details.description: Details for each duplicate group processed

multipleRolesCleanupDetails.description: Details of multiple roles cleanup for all users (not part of duplicate groups)

emailPasswordPrimaryWarnings.description: Warnings for groups where primary is email/password (not Google). Review these as OAuth accounts may be deleted.

deleted.description: Number of entities deleted (only for tenants, permissions, roles)

updated.description: Number of entities updated (only for roles)

errors.description: List of error messages for failed entities

tenantId.description: Tenant ID where the user has multiple roles

usedRole.description: Role ID that was used for the membership

tenantId.description: Tenant ID where the user has no role

dryRun.description: Whether this was a dry run (preview mode - no changes made)

multipleRolesWarnings.description: Warnings for users with multiple roles in a tenant (only first role is used)

usersWithoutRoleWarnings.description: Warnings for users without any role in a tenant (no membership created)
